task: Add staleness indicator when storyboard edited after agent run
result: Implemented staleness indicator for AgentSuggestionsPanel. Added storyboardVersion field to AgentSuggestion type (joined from agent_runs table), updated getSuggestions to join with agent_runs, and added visual indicators: amber badge with clock icon showing 'X edits ago', tooltip explaining stale results, and 60% opacity for stale cards. PR #2188 created.
